# Instructions for AI coding agents

This folder is used by GitHub Copilot and other agents that support `.github/instructions/`.

- **Project-wide context**: Prefer [AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md) at the repo root for Forge, extension, resource formats, build commands, and where to change things.
- **Copilot workspace instructions**: [../copilot-instructions.md](../copilot-instructions.md) covers game engine architecture, managers, GFF, testing, and conventions, plus a Forge/extension summary.

When working on the **Forge app** or the **VS Code extension**, always consider AGENTS.md and the editor-type → TabState mapping so changes stay consistent across library, Forge, and extension.
